task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "接收用户提供的URL"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "检查URL是否存在可疑域名或拼写错误"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "推荐使用DownForEveryoneOrJustMe工具检查链接状态"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "建议用户在隐私模式下手动测试链接"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "根据用户反馈决定是否进一步分析URL"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "指导用户保存网页为HTML文件以提取内容"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "推荐使用MarkDownload工具提取文章内容"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "提供Python脚本以自动化提取标题和正文"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "提取文章标题（通常位于<h1>标签）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "提取子标题（通常位于<h2>或<h3>标签）"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "提取文章正文（通常位于<article>或<div class='article-body'>标签）"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "清理正文内容（移除广告、脚本等非必要元素）"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "对比提取内容与原文长度"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "检查提取内容是否包含关键短语"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "确认提取内容是否包含结构化部分（如Introduction/Conclusion）"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node3", "type": "suggestTool"}, {"source": "Node1", "target": "Node4", "type": "suggestManualTest"}, {"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "analyze"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "feedback"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "feedback"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "guideSaveHTML"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node7", "type": "recommendTool"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node8", "type": "provideScript"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "extractTitle"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node10", "type": "extractSubheadings"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node11", "type": "extractBody"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "cleanContent"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node13", "type": "compareLength"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node14", "type": "checkKeyPhrases"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node15", "type": "verifyStructure"}]}
